title: CodeBuddy Permission Scope Config
description: Controls the active permission profile and tool/command scoping for the CodeBuddy agent in this workspace.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

profile.description: Permission profile: restricted (read-only, no terminal), standard (read/write, safe terminal), trusted (full access, auto-approve).

commandDenyPatterns.description: Extra regex patterns for terminal commands to deny, merged with the built-in dangerous command list.

items.description: A regex pattern matching commands to block.

toolAllowlist.description: Tool names explicitly allowed regardless of profile restrictions.

toolBlocklist.description: Tool names explicitly blocked regardless of profile. Blocklist takes priority over allowlist.
